title: Curator of the Flame
description: The Curator stands before the throne room doors. A scholar who asks questions to map your weaknesses. From World 1 novella ch9.

steps.text: The Curator of the Flame stood before the throne room doors. Scholar's robes, singed at the cuffs. A staff with a cupped flame at the top that had clearly been burning for years.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: Before we begin — and we will begin, I'm sorry about that — can I ask what you think is behind the flame?

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: We'll know when we open the doors.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: Of course you'll try. I've studied this room for eleven years. I am genuinely uncertain if what you're looking for is here. That's the most interesting thing that's happened all decade.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: The Warden reports your adaptability. The Arbiter reports your irregular formation. The Tempo reports your decision-making under pressure.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: Tell me about your resource strategy. I've been studying it and I find myself with questions.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: We tend not to explain our strategy to the people guarding doors we need to open.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: And when the conversation ends, you'll fight us with everything we just told you.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: Your pattern recognition is excellent. The Arbiter mentioned it. Then let's skip to the relevant part. I cannot let you through. My purpose requires this.
